objective: Understand and implement ER diagram design and relational mapping for database systems.
learningObjectives: Design ER diagrams for given problem domains using standard notation
Identify and represent entities, attributes, and relationships correctly
Apply cardinality and participation constraints appropriately
Map ER diagrams to relational schemas following standard mapping rules
Create relational tables with primary keys, foreign keys, and constraints
Handle complex scenarios including weak entities and composite attributes
expectedOutcomes: Produce clear ER diagrams for typical application domains
Translate ER models into equivalent relational schemas
Define tables with appropriate keys and integrity constraints
Explain the relationship between conceptual (ER) and logical (relational) design
